mnemonics: MOTHERS - Most Outstanding Responsibility Ensures Transparency, Honesty, and Respect
HARMONIZE - Human-AI Responsibility for Maximizing Interests, Navigating Unintended Consequences, and Ensuring Reversible Actions
keyPoints: Ensure Transparency in AI Decision Making Processes
Implement Human Oversight for Complex AI Systems
Consider Multiple Stakeholder Perspectives in AI Development
Design for Accountability and Explainability in AI Systems
Prioritize Fairness, Respect, and Empathy in AI Decision Making
Address Bias and Unintended Consequences in AI Systems
Establish Robust Governance Frameworks for AI Development and Deployment
